{"id":"project-LICHEN-vjgx","title":"_is_mesh_uri redundant bracket stripping","description":"File: python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py:81-82

The mesh URI validation strips IPv6 brackets manually:
```python
if host.startswith('[') and host.endswith(']'):
    host = host[1:-1]
```

But urlparse().hostname already returns IPv6 addresses without brackets per RFC 3986. This code path is unreachable and adds dead code.

Example: urlparse('coap://[fe80::1]/path').hostname returns 'fe80::1', not '[fe80::1]'.

Fix: Remove the redundant bracket stripping. If keeping for defensive coding, add a comment explaining why.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:14.594764Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:14.594796Z"}
